assertions: acceptance_met: criteria measured and met (or honestly re-graded with proof) under re-run
quota_met: ideation quota with distinct mechanisms across required lenses
refutations: fresh refutation per idea; honest kills logged
provenance_live: real search log, closest-found grammar, known art labeled
rung_honest: witness-artifact rule respected; no inflation
rubric_ranking: §8 dimensions scored with verification as gate
determinism: >=99/100 identical outcomes; locked control clean
